text.text: 🚨 *Anomaly — complete traffic blackout for 2+ days (ticket created: DEV-875)*

No page view data — 0 traffic recorded yesterday

*Referral Sources* (vs last week)
No referral data — 0 traffic recorded yesterday

*Signals*
• *What:* Sessions 34 → 0 (↓100% WoW), users 24 → 0, page views 137 → 0. Zero traffic recorded on both Jun 20 and Jun 21.
  *So what:* A two-day complete blackout at a 34-session baseline is almost certainly a GA4 tag failure or a site/hosting issue — not organic traffic variance.
  *Now what:* 1) Verify formoria.com is live. 2) Open DevTools → Network and confirm GA4 tag fires on pageload. 3) Check Vercel deployment logs from Jun 20 onward for any failed deploy or redirect misconfiguration. 4) Confirm GA4 property 538232091 shows activity in the Realtime report.

*Ticket Created*
• <https://linear.app/ytchou/issue/DEV-875|DEV-875>: [Growth Pulse] 2026-06-22 — Complete traffic blackout: 0 sessions for 2+ days

elements.text: Compared against same weekday last week (Jun 14). GA4 data may lag 24–48h.
